A test case to verify the correctness of the Math.pow function in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that verifies the correctness of the `Math.pow` function in JavaScript. It checks if raising 2 to the power of 2 results in 4. The use of `assert` ensures that the test will throw an error if the condition is false, which helps in validating the expected behavior of the `Math.pow` function. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on testing a specific mathematical operation.
